meta.title: Quran Lights - Read, Rise, and Recite
meta.description: Quran Lights - Track your Quran recitation and review rates through interactive charts. Read, rise, and recite the Holy Quran
meta.keywords: Holy Quran, Quran recitation, Quran memorization, Quran review, Quran Lights, Quranic rates, Quranic charts

home.title: Charts and Dashboards for Your Quranic Rates
home.description: Quran Lights enables you to track your recitation and periodic review rates through visual charts

feature.title: Each Surah is Represented by a Luminous Cell
feature.point1: The cell's brightness fades over time until the Surah is recited again
feature.point2: The time elapsed since last recitation is displayed on the cell
feature.point3: Character count is shown for calculating daily and cumulative balance
feature.point4: You can add markers to distinguish the memorization status of each Surah
feature.point5: Simply remember to illuminate the corresponding cell after finishing any Surah recitation
feature.point6: You can reorder the Quran's Surahs based on revelation order, number of verses, characters, words, or recitation count

feature1.title: The luminous cells will build a light map showing the status of each Surah in your memory through varying brightness over time, with warning markers on Surahs exceeding the allowed time

feature2.title: Charts are created to display daily, monthly, and yearly balance

feature3.title: You will have a radar to monitor slipping Surahs

feature4.title: You can calculate the percentage of Quran you have memorized

feature5.title: Parents and Quran teachers can track children's and students' rates by creating a profile for each
